## 干 — カン 🟢 - **Type**: 形声 phonetic (sound component) - **Lends the reading**: カン - **Reliability**: 🟢 Rock-solid — the sound wins every time - **JLPT**: N2 ### How it works Each member is a **radical + 干**: the radical gives the *meaning*, while **干** carries the **カン** sound. Strip the radical off an unknown kanji, spot **干**, and you can usually read it. Trust it — every member below reads **カン** (allowing regular voicing カ→ガ). ### Family — kanji that share this sound | Kanji | Meaning | |---|---| | 刊 | publish | | 汗 | sweat | | 肝 | liver | | 幹 | trunk | ### Example 新幹線 (しんかんせん) — bullet train

## 帝 — テイ 🟢 - **Type**: 形声 phonetic (sound component) - **Lends the reading**: テイ - **Reliability**: 🟢 Rock-solid — the sound wins every time - **JLPT**: N1 ### How it works Each member is a **radical + 帝**: the radical gives the *meaning*, while **帝** carries the **テイ** sound. Strip the radical off an unknown kanji, spot **帝**, and you can usually read it. Trust it — every member below reads **テイ** (allowing regular voicing カ→ガ). ### Family — kanji that share this sound | Kanji | Meaning | |---|---| | 締 | tie | | 諦 | give up | | 蹄 | hoof | ### Example 締結 (ていけつ) — conclusion (of treaty)

## 各 — カク／ラク／ロ／リャク 🔴 - **Type**: 形声 phonetic (sound component) - **Lends the reading**: カク／ラク／ロ／リャク - **Reliability**: 🔴 Unreliable — scatters; learn each per word - **JLPT**: N3 ### How it works Each member is a **radical + 各**: the radical gives the *meaning*, while **各** carries the **カク／ラク／ロ／リャク** sound. Strip the radical off an unknown kanji, spot **各**, and you can usually read it. **Don't predict** from 各 — it scatters; learn each member's reading per word. ### Family — reading → members | Reading | Members | |---|---| | カク | 格・閣 | | ラク | 落・絡 | | ロ | 路 | | リャク | 略 | ### Example 連絡 (れんらく) — contact

explanation: ## 阝 — こざとへん - **Type**: 部首 radical · hen (left) - **Meaning**: hill / mound - **Standalone form**: 阜 - **JLPT**: N3 ### Words that use 阝 | Word | Reading | Meaning | |---|---|---| | 防ぐ | ふせぐ | prevent | | 限る | かぎる | limit | | 階段 | かいだん | stairs | | 院 | いん | institution | ### Note Left side only — right 阝 is おおざと

## 复 — フク 🟢 - **Type**: 形声 phonetic (sound component) - **Lends the reading**: フク - **Reliability**: 🟢 Rock-solid — the sound wins every time - **JLPT**: N3 ### How it works Each member is a **radical + 复**: the radical gives the *meaning*, while **复** carries the **フク** sound. Strip the radical off an unknown kanji, spot **复**, and you can usually read it. Trust it — every member below reads **フク** (allowing regular voicing カ→ガ). ### Family — kanji that share this sound | Kanji | Meaning | |---|---| | 復 | return | | 複 | double | | 腹 | belly | | 覆 | cover | ### Example 複雑 (ふくざつ) — complex
